== Notes for [[Item:Q116586|Q116586]] ==

Fulcoald of Rouergue

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Fulcoald, Foucaud, Fulguald or Fulqualdus is sometimes called the Count of Rouergue and founder of that dynasty of counts which ruled Toulouse and often all of Gothia for the next four centuries. In 837, he was appointed missus dominicus along with Ragambald in the pago Rutenico seu Nemausense: country of Rouergue and Nîmes (probably Septimania).

Fulcoald married Senegunda (or Senegundia, French Sénégonde), whose family is not recorded, although some web sites, without source, name her as a daughter of Alda ("of Gellone"). By her he had two sons: Fredelon and Raymond.

Foundation for Medieval Genealogy:

FOUCAUD [Fulqualdus], son of --- (-after 837). "Ragambaldo seu Fulcoaldo comite" are named as royal missi in "pago Rutenico seu Nemausense" (Rouergue and Nîmes) in 837[186].

m SENEGONDE, daughter of ---. Her marriage is confirmed by the charter dated 3 Nov 862 under which "Raymundus…comes et marchio et uxor mea Berteyz" founded the abbey of Vabres for the souls of "genitoris nostri Fulgualdi et…genetrice mea Senegundi et…germano meo Fredolone quondam"[187].

Comte Foucaud & his wife had two children: Fredelon ([815]-[849/52]), governor of Toulouse, and Raymond ([815/20]-before 17 Apr 865), who was named Comte de Rouergue et Comte de Quercy in 849 by Charles “le Chauve” King of France, and who succeeded in 855 as RAYMOND I Comte et Marquis de Toulouse.
--------------------
http://genealogiequebec.info/testphp/info.php?no=39296

887185152. Greve og kommissær Fulgauald (Fulacoald) was a Greve og kommissær in 836 in Septimanien

SOURCE NOTES:
www.dcs.hull.ac.uk/cgi-bin/gedlkup/n=royal?royal07781

RESEARCH NOTES:
Count of Rouergue

38th great grandfather

He was alive in 836.

He was alive in 836.

Name Prefix:<NPFX> Count

Name Prefix:<NPFX> Count

Fulcoald (Fulguald) var i 836 greve av Rouergue og kommissær i Septimanien.
Han var gift med Senegonde.

Rootsweb Feldman
URL: http://worldconnect.genealogy.rootsweb.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=:3044567&id=I16558
# D: I16558
# Name: Fulgaud Foucaud Count of ROUERGUE 1 2 3 4 5
# Sex: M
# Birth: ABT 780 in France 1 2 3 4 5
# Change Date: 15 JAN 2004 5
# Change Date: 19 OCT 2001 2 3 4 5
# Note:

[Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED]

2 SOUR S332582
3 DATA
4 TEXT Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004


[daveanthes.FTW]

GIVN Fulgaud (Foucaud) Count of
SURN Rouergue
TITL Royalty for Commoners: The Complete Known Lineage of John of Gaunt, Son of Edward III, King of England, and Queen Philip
AUTH Roderick W. Stuart
PUBL 3rd ed., 1998, Genealogical Publishing Co., Inc., Baltimore, MD
ABBR Royalty for Commoners
STAT LIVE
Dead
!Royal Ancestors.....(1989) by M Call 11627 #2
TITL Royalty for Commoners: The Complete Known Lineage of John of Gaunt, Son of Edward III, King of England, and Queen Philip
AUTH Roderick W. Stuart
PUBL 3rd ed., 1998, Genealogical Publishing Co., Inc., Baltimore, MD
ABBR Royalty for Commoners
DATE 11 NOV 1999
TIME 21:25:06

OCCU Count of Rodez ..
SOUR al7fl.abts.net/green-page/greenged.html
SOUR Royalty for Commoners, Roderick W. Stuart says liv 837
PAGE 231
QUAY 1
Count of Rouergues - COMYNI.GED (Compuserve), #1308; Foucaud,Count of Rouergue
;liv 837 - Royalty for Commoners, Roderick W. Stuart, p. 231; "Fulcoad,
Fulguald, Foucaud" Count of Rodez, Rouerges - al7fl.abt
s.net/green-page/greenged.html;

Father: SIGIBERT

Marriage 1 Senegonde DE ROUERGUE b: ABT 785 in Toulouse, France

* Married: ABT 820 in France 1 2 3 4 5

Children

1. Has Children Raimond I DE TOULOUSE b: ABT 843 in Toulouse, France


Sources:

1. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004
2. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: Jan 13, 2004
3. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Jan 18, 2004
4. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: 21 Jan 2004
5. Title: Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Feb 6, 2004

Rootsweb Feldman
URL: http://worldconnect.genealogy.rootsweb.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=:3044567&id=I18735
# ID: I18735
# Name: Fulcoald DE ROUERGUE 1 2 3 4 5
# Sex: M
# Birth: ABT 750 in Rouergue, France 1 2 3 4 5
# Change Date: 15 JAN 2004 5
# Change Date: 14 JUL 2001 2 3 4 5
# Note:

[Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED]

2 SOUR S332582
3 DATA
4 TEXT Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004


[daveanthes.FTW]

OCCU Count of Rouergue
SOUR al7fl.abts.net/green-page/greenged.html

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown

Children

1. Has Children Fredelon Of AUTUN b: 750 in Rouergue, Toulouse, France


Sources:

1. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004
2. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: Jan 13, 2004
3. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Jan 18, 2004
4. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: 21 Jan 2004
5. Title: Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Feb 6, 2004

#Générale##Générale#Profession : Comte de Rouergue.

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
